full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by Sarah.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 2 ml for 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 4x 1.18x10^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 3x 0.923x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4.96 | 2.85
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.07 | 1.93
 | viability [%] | 41.8 | 67.7
 | size [µm] | 8.2 | 10.7
2) | total [E7 cells/ml] | 4.49 | 2.69
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.0 | 1.61
 | viability [%] | 44.5 | 60.1
 | size [µm] | 8.1 | 11
Average | total [E6 cells/ml] | 4.725 | 2.77
total | total [E6 cells] | 4.725 in 1 ml | 2.77 in 1 ml
Average | live [E6 cells/ml] | 2.035 | 1.77
total | live [E6 cells] | 2.035 in 1 ml | 1.77 in 1 ml
 | viability [%] | 43.15 | 63.8
